para_trans: Drug De-addiction in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation area
Teaming up to run an "awareness campaign"
Commissioner, Brihanmumbai in the High-Level Committee
Incorporated as a member of the Municipal Corporation
Government Supplementary Letter No: Narrow - 0526 / P.No.157 / VISA-3 (A)
Reference: - Government Decision on serial numbers, d. 21.05.2026
Drug-free awareness in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation area as per the decision of the government in question.
Mangal Prabhat Lodha, Joint Guardian Minister, Mumbai Suburban for effective implementation of the campaign.
A high-level committee has been constituted under the chairmanship of the Chief Minister. The committee is under the jurisdiction of the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation.
Commissioner, Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation in this high-level committee to make the work more effective.
These are being approved for inclusion as members.
This Government Supplementary Letter is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
